details: The agent correctly traced the full causal chain: pod db-5bfcfcd584-jcf6z is Pending → PVC data-cache is Pending/unbound → StorageClass 'fast-ssd' does not exist in the cluster (only 'standard' is available). The agent ran actual kubectl commands at each step (get pods, describe pod, get/describe pvc, get storageclass, get pv) and the outputs confirm the diagnosis. The root cause was correctly identified as the nonexistent 'fast-ssd' StorageClass.
